name: SweetPoll

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: Private state of the SweetPoll component

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { url : String, decoder : Decoder data, delay : Time, samesBeforeDelay : Int, delayMultiplier : Float, maxDelay : Time }

aliases.name: UpdateResult
aliases.comment:
- sweetPollModel: the new state of the SweetPoll
 - newData: any new data received by the SweetPoll
 - error: any new error occurring in the current update cycle
 - cmd: a Cmd to keep the SweetPoll running
aliases.type: { sweetPollModel : Model data, newData : Maybe data, error : Maybe Error, cmd : Cmd (Msg data) }

values.name: init
values.type: Config data -> ( Model data, Cmd (Msg data) )

values.name: update
values.type: Msg data -> Model data -> UpdateResult data
